news.title: Harlem Perfume Co. Releases Sensual Muse: The One They All Had To Paint
news.description: Harlem Perfume Co dreams up the fictional muse that the Harlem Renaissance masters just had to make art about...
news.author: Patric Rhys

news.title: Givenchy L'Interdit Elixir
news.description: Givenchy expands its L'Interdit collection with L'Interdit Elixir, a new Eau de Parfum that introduces a richer, more gourmand interpretation of the signature white floral fragrance.
news.author: Sanja Pekić

news.title: Candy from Strangers: Typical Francesca Bianchi
news.description: Powder, leather, violet caramel, and a provocation on the topic of seducing children
news.author: Sergey Borisov

news.title: Esxence 2026: Yūgen by AVII Perfumes
news.description: Pear lemonade with white flower petals.
news.author: Alena Lavault

news.title: Lullaby Urban Scents: Clean Body and Pure Mind
news.description: A delicate rose, wrapped in white powder, like a rosy-cheeked, plump baby, dusted with talc and swaddled in a snow-white cocoon of cotton after a bath.
news.author: Sergey Borisov

news.title: The Adventures of a Perfume Bottle. Part Two: Facts and Figures
news.description: Let's go back to the 1960s and 70s and talk about packaging and atomizers.
news.author: 1001 Past Tales

news.title: O Boticário Launches Malbec Eau de Parfum
news.description: O Boticário's Icon Reaches Its Highest Concentration.
news.author: Jernê Knowles

news.title: Esxence 2026: Not Only New Releases, But Old Favorites Too
news.description: There is no point in chasing every new releases when older fragrances are just as good.
news.author: Viktoria Vlasova

news.title: Jean Paul Gaultier Launches La Favorite
news.description: Jean Paul Gaultier prepares to launch a fragrance pillar, with new perfume La Favorite.
news.author: Sanja Pekić

news.title: Versace Man Eau Fraîche Extreme
news.description: Dark, boring, vanillic seas
news.author: Eddie Bulliqi

news.title: Aplomb: A New Perfume Brand From Finland
news.description: The brand launches with three scents
news.author: Nicola Thomis

news.title: Matière Première Metal Lavender: The Romance of Provence and Heavy Metal
news.description: A modern lavender. Effortless. Oversized. Comfortable. Easy to wear. A luminous and enveloping trail. Lavender in a new incarnation.
news.author: Matvey Yudov

news.title: 6 Classic Fragrances I Always Revert to in a Heatwave
news.description: There are some fragrances that have proven again and again their ability to cut through the canopy of heat and humidity.
news.author: Elena Vosnaki

news.title: Perfumed Horoscope: July 20-26
news.description: The Mercury retrograde period ends on the 23rd. I’m looking forward to all the corrections and turning my daydream into reality.
news.author: Zoran Cerar

news.title: How Oud Is Born
news.description: Learning to tell agarwood chip grades apart like a true insider.
news.author: Columns

news.title: Nuit Patchouli by La Maison de la Vanille: Three Facets of Patchouli
news.description: From coolness to warmth.
news.author: Elena Prokofeva

news.title: Bel Ami and Bel Ami Vétiver by Hermès: Do Even Geniuses Make Mistakes?
news.description: Comparing the original and the flanker.
news.author: Igor Masyukov

news.title: Ghost Trees Fulton & Roark
news.description: Beautiful California, gray Pacific.
news.author: Elena Knezevic

news.title: Sarah Baker’s Peach Trilogy: A Tale of Three Peaches
news.description: Which peach speaks to you most — carefree, vengeful, or wicked?
news.author: Matvey Yudov

news.title: Blue Incense by Amado and Imagination
news.description: A modern bestseller, Middle Eastern style.
news.author: Igor Masyukov

news.title: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Orchid VS Flora Gorgeous Orchid Intense
news.description: Gelato vs crème brûlée
news.author: Eddie Bulliqi

news.title: Review of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" (Spoiler alert!)
news.description: Spoiler alert: if you haven't seen the film yet, you probably shouldn't read this.
news.author: Elena Knezevic

news.title: Maison Nomad Noé Launched Habibi Vanilla
news.description: "The emotional intimacy of being so close that connection feels wordless."
news.author: Bella van der Weerd

news.title: The Face of Chanel Coco Mademoiselle Crush Absolu
news.description: Gracie Abrams, new face of Coco Mademoiselle
news.author: New Fragrances

news.title: The Journey of the Turkish Rose in Perfumery
news.description: The concept of the Turkish Rose in perfumery, the history of the Isparta Rose, its harvest process, and its place in perfumes.
news.author: Sena Toprak

news.title: Fragrance Cloud Plots: A New Way to Experience Perfume
news.description: Presented by Nodus Perfume House, Fragrance Cloud Plots offer a new way of explaining how a perfume evolves over time.
news.author: Giulietta Ptoyan

news.title: New From Swiss Brand BODÉ STUDIOS: Zabianca.
news.description: The scent of early spring on the Amalfi Coast.
news.author: Bella van der Weerd

news.title: The Adventures of a Perfume Bottle. Part One: The Price of Luxury
news.description: The most fascinating, complex, and expensive process was the manufacture of bottles with ground-glass stoppers — and that is what we will discuss today.
news.author: Galina Anni

news.title: How Far Does Our Obsession in Perfumery Go?
news.description: When the trail of a fragrance transforms into obsession and memory.
news.author: Jernê Knowles

news.title: El Morocco Perfumery & Тhe Legendary New York Nightclub
news.description: Five fragrances inspired by café society of NYC from the 1930s through the 1950s.
news.author: New Fragrances

news.title: AEREO Pigmentarium: A Next-Level Skin Scent
news.description: Soft, intimate and quietly addictive, it feels like a warm cloud of comfort – ethereal, grounded and beautifully close to the skin.
news.author: Markéta Rybínová

news.title: A Liquid That Smells
news.description: What turns a smell into perfume?
news.author: Andrei Lensky

news.title: Valentino Beauty Introduces Vendetta Donna and Vendetta Uomo
news.description: More than 30 years after the original Vendetta fragrances debuted in 1991, Valentino returns to the name with a new fragrance duo: Vendetta Donna and Vendetta Uomo.
news.author: Sanja Pekić

news.title: New Book 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘾𝙪𝙡𝙩𝙪𝙧𝙚𝙨 𝙤𝙛 𝙋𝙚𝙧𝙛𝙪𝙢𝙚: 𝙎𝙘𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙏𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙎𝙝𝙖𝙥𝙚𝙙 𝙃𝙞𝙨𝙩𝙤𝙧𝙮 by Saskia Wilson-Brown
news.description: A people’s history of perfume – what the art of olfaction can teach us about ourselves and our common humanity. Now available for pre-order.
news.author: Eddie Bulliqi

news.title: Oriflame Launches Two New Creations in the Top Scent Collection: La La Lime and Tropic Thunder
news.description: Summer is here!
news.author: Iulia Halatz

news.title: Giallo Riviera by Arte Profumi: Coolness Takes the Leading Role
news.description: Not particularly sunny — and not quite as citrusy as you might expect...
news.author: Elena Prokofeva

news.title: Carnal Cacao by Maison Tahité: Special Smoky Chilli Chocolate
news.description: With banana, bell pepper, and jungle greens
news.author: Eddie Bulliqi

news.title: Ellis Brooklyn's Summer Escape Isla Sirena
news.description: Fresh notes of coconut water and lime balanced with creamy notes of Blue Java banana, papaya, and vanilla...
news.author: Bella van der Weerd

news.title: Ateliê 55 Candles 24h Collection: A Review
news.description: With every burn, a different, pleasurable revelation.
news.author: Jernê Knowles

news.title: The Fragrances I Usually Wear in Summer in Central Asia
news.description: Shilde is the hottest time of year, when peak solar radiation scorches everything across the steppe and foothills: grass and leaves turn yellowish-brown, while the air smells of dust and dry wormwood.

news.description: Miguel explores returning to the roots of his niche perfume discoveries.

news.title: Maison Sorbier Parfums
news.description: An olfactory tribute to the world's most opulent textiles.
news.author: Elena Knezevic

news.title: You Might Be Fragrance Obsessed If .... (Yes There's More)
news.description: After collecting and curating a perfume collection for over 14 years, I couldn’t help but think of more habits or idiosyncrasies of perfume lovers.

news.title: Doll by Bel Rebel: Chocolate-Covered, Rum-Filled Apricots
news.description: Another tale of rum and raisin?
news.author: Eddie Bulliqi

news.title: Micodelirio by Nasomatto: Mushrooms, But Not The Ones You Thought
news.description: It won't open your third eye, but it will definitely plunge you into the atmosphere of a mushroom-filled forest.

news.description: A new era of fan-driven fragrance.
